rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes
Use annex agree {** ... **}; syntax for AGREE contracts
generic_rules: Component ports in contracts must be represented through valid variables or outputs
AGREE contracts are written in component type annexes for assumptions and guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq variable : bool = expression for range comparisons in AGREE
Do not reference AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes
Do not use Boolean domain values as integers in AGREE
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing properties
